name: Counter-Strike 2
author: ops@refx.example
description: Valve's Counter-Strike 2 dedicated server. SteamCMD-installed; requires a Game Server Login Token (GSLT) for public listing.
startupDetect: Connection to Steam servers successful|GC Connection established

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server
# Locate or bootstrap steamcmd (the parkervcp/steamcmd image does NOT ship it
# on PATH; eggs are expected to fetch it themselves).
if command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  STEAMCMD=steamcmd
else
  echo "[steam] bootstrapping steamcmd"
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  STEAMCMD=/mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh
fi
"$STEAMCMD" +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 730 validate +quit
mkdir -p /mnt/server/game/csgo/cfg
chmod +x ./game/bin/linuxsteamrt64/cs2 || true
echo 'CS2 install complete.'

variables.description: Game Server Login Token from steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers (app 730). Required for public servers.

longDescription: Competitive Counter-Strike 2 servers for scrims, practice and community play with full config control.
